releaseImpact.cloudFunctions: Deploy post and the new wechat-audit-callback HTTP function, provision /wechat-audit-callback, and run the callback trust-guard smoke.
releaseImpact.miniprogram: Rebuild and upload the mini-program so pending media review explicitly promises automatic publication after passing.
environmentVariables: Set WX_APPID and WX_APPSECRET on post.
Set WX_APPID and a strong WX_MESSAGE_TOKEN on wechat-audit-callback without logging secret values.
